description_long: This is a rustic, two-wheeled wooden handcart with a flat, slatted load platform and sturdy side rails. The cart features large, spoked wooden wheels mounted centrally on either side, providing balance and mobility. Two long, straight wooden handles extend from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The load platform is bordered by vertical wooden posts and horizontal rails, helping to secure cargo during transport. The wood appears weathered, with a natural brown finish and visible grain, giving the cart a traditional, utilitarian appearance. This type of handcart is commonly used for transporting goods or materials in urban or rural settings.
description: A traditional wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, side rails, and long front handles for manual transport. The cart has a flat, slatted platform and a weathered brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual handles extending outward and the slatted platform with side rails visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, the length of the handles, and the full side rail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the platform and the side rails enclosing the load area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the second wheel, handles, and the slatted platform clearly visible.
